rulings.Case Title: IN RE: WISFE AISH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion For Costs And Reasonable Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, Nov-09-2021 line 1. PETITIONERS WISFE AISH, WA-SFCT LLC, 288 27TH STREET LLC, A&M PROPERTIES, L.P.'S Motion For Costs And Reasonable Attorneys Fees Petitioner's Motion for Costs and Fees is DENIED. The fees incurred in bringing this petition for failure to file an action within 90 days were not reasonably incurred. The statutes provide for a simple mechanism to avoid the filing of the Petition by providing notice as to the basis for the request to release the mechanics lien. No evidence is provided by the moving party that 90-day expiration issue was brought to respondent's attention via a formal notice or otherwise before this petition was filed and the fees were incurred. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: EMMANUEL KLU ET AL VS. ROBERTO RIVERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant Nery Juarez'S Motion Under Ccp Sec 473 For Relief From Expiration Of Time To File Prejudgement Claim
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, Nov-09-2021 line 5. DEFENDANT NERY JUAREZ'S Motion Under Ccp Sec 473 For Relief From Expiration Of Time To File Prejudgement Claim Nery Juarez' Motion for Relief from Failure to file Pre-Judgment Claim of Right to Possession is GRANTED. Juarez shall file a claim and an answer no later than November 9, 2021. Writ shall not include Juarez, but otherwise remains enforceable. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). rulings.Case Title: DIAMOND VIEW RESIDENTS' ASSOCIATION, INC. VS. SEAN SULLIVAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, Nov-09-2021 line 3. DEFENDANT SEAN SULLIVAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT Defendant's Motion to Strike Amended Complaint is DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Plaintiff is precluded after October 1, 2021 from obtaining a judgment finding a defendant guilty of unlawful detainer that would also include tort hold-over damages. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303).
